productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Red And White Minnie Flower Kidswear
description: CompositionWhite and red round neck, sleeveless t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with red bib around neckline, red ruffles on hemline and embroidered image of Minnie on the front Wash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitThis patterned white and red Minnie Mouse tee from disney is perfect for your little princess. Minnie will keep her company while she romps around in the park or runs around with her friends. The ruflled hemline and the cute heart print add a dainty touch, while the sleeveless cotton tee will keep your little one comfortably dry. It looks great when teamed up with denim shorts or skirts for an enjoyable outing. Add on a pair of pretty footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra, include colourful jibbitz, and transform your little darling into a princess.
